steps.notes: Queried AI Brief Story Pool database via Notion API. Retrieved all rows, filtered to Status=Candidate and Week=W22. Found 32 Candidate stories for the current week, plus client profiles and hard sensitivities embedded in the step prompt. Staged full pull with client profiles and all candidate stories to workspace/run/brief-assembly/notion-pull.json. Excluded rows with Status=Used, Status=Archived, Week=W21, or null/empty fields.

Tailored 4-5 stories per client across all 7 clients. Processed sequentially (one at a time). All client sensitivities honored: KPS Life framed as embedded expert leverage (no headcount replacement), ChristianaCare framed through patient safety (no cost-cutting), Luna Diabetes uses 'lean team' language (no specific financials/headcount), M&T Bank excludes pure capital-markets items, Alpine framed through activist lens. Each brief includes Week in One Line, tailored What It Means, bespoke What It Means For Client with concrete action, and If Used Why rationale.
actions: sessions_spawn select-and-tailor sub-agent with model openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro
sub-agent processed 7 clients sequentially, wrote 7 JSON files to workspace

steps.notes: Rendered 7 single-page branded PDF briefs. All verified at exactly 1 Letter-page. Brand specs applied.
